caption.full:
Lewis Pullman and Julia Garner star in Apple TV+ thriller Guilty.

The series unravels the lives of lovers living as killers for 18 years. It is an adaptation of Mikita Brottman's true crime book. Craig Gillespie is attached to direct.

What are your thoughts on this chilling true crime adaptation?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#TVNews #TrueCrime #GuiltyCreatures #LewisPullman
caption.firstComment: The idea of killers living undetected for 18 years is wild. What do you think drives someone to maintain such a facade?

youtube.title: Lewis Pullman: 'Guilty Creatures' Thriller & 'Spaceballs 2' With Bill
youtube.description:
Lewis Pullman is set to star opposite Julia Garner in the upcoming Apple TV+ thriller series 'Guilty Creatures'. The show unravels the lives of lovers living as killers for 18 years, based on a true crime book. He will also be seen with his father, Bill Pullman, in 'Spaceballs: The New One'.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
